description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the buildstream/buildstream-fedora:latest Docker image with three stages: pep8, convert, and build. Define variables BST_FOLDER, JSONCOMMENT_VERSION, PYCODESTYLE_VERSION. Add a check_pep8 job in the pep8 stage that exports PATH, installs pycodestyle==$PYCODESTYLE_VERSION via pip3 --user, and runs pycodestyle --show-source --show-pep8 . Add a convert job in the convert stage that installs jsoncomment via pip3 --user, clones the freedesktop-sdk-images repo, checks out tag 1.6, runs python3 json2Bst/main.py with the given arguments pointing to $BST_FOLDER, and lists the folder; always publish $BST_FOLDER as an artifact. Add a build job in the build stage that reuses a shared before_script which exports BST_SHA, clones the BuildStream repo, checks out $BST_SHA, and installs BuildStream via pip3; then the script creates tests/elements, moves *.bst files, creates a project.conf, modifies several .bst files with sed to replace track: with ref: and adjust URLs, and finally runs bst show fcitx.bst.
